boundary_binding.action_boundary: May HR or payroll execute the requested workforce, pay, benefits, or employment-status action? Focus: retro-pay adjustment inside signed compensation change order.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Control record confirms exact match closes boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: ESCALATE is required when exact current source evidence leaves the packet action boundary open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Signed comp order matches per control record.

critical_features_preserved: signed comp order amount, employee, and pay period match
final_answer: Based on source records, HR or payroll may execute the retro-pay adjustment because the signed compensation change order matches in amount, employee, and pay period per the control record.
